segments.text: Reads the inside airdodge and charges up that forward smash!
segments.original_text: 内回避読みの横スマッシュホールドまでしちゃって
相手を大きく威嚇する

segments.text: Though the up B does get caught...
segments.original_text: これはギガファイヤーに上必殺技当たってしまうが

segments.text: Barely makes it back with perfect recovery timing!
segments.original_text: なんとかタイミングよく上必殺技の復帰を通した

segments.text: Chrom's up B is incredibly weak...
segments.original_text: クロムの上必殺ね非常に弱いんですが

full_text: Reads the inside airdodge and charges up that forward smash! Really threatening the opponent! Though the up B does get caught... Barely makes it back with perfect recovery timing! Chrom's up B is incredibly weak...
